# Copilot Instructions — edosulai/edosulai

## Repo Purpose

This is the **GitHub profile README** repo (`edosulai/edosulai`). The sole deliverable is a polished `README.md` that renders on the GitHub profile page.

**Note:** `README.md` is auto-generated by the `edo-knowledge` sync pipeline. Do not edit it manually — changes will be overwritten.

## Structure

- `README.md` — profile page content (auto-generated from `edo-knowledge`)

## Content Guidelines

- Content flows from `edo-knowledge/exposure.yaml` → `sync.js` → this repo.
- Social links use shields.io badges with base64-encoded SVG logos for icons removed from Simple Icons (e.g., LinkedIn).
- Tech stack icons are sourced from `skillicons.dev` with `<picture>` tags for dark/light theme switching.

## Editing Rules

- To change profile content, edit source files in `edo-knowledge` and re-run the sync pipeline.
- Do not add build tools, CI workflows, or package managers — this repo is static content only.
- Do not introduce JavaScript, CSS, or any runtime code.

## Formatting

- Prefer standard GitHub-Flavored Markdown where possible; use inline HTML only when Markdown cannot achieve the layout (e.g., side-by-side images, icon sizing).
- External image URLs must use HTTPS.
- Keep line lengths reasonable for readability in raw Markdown view.
